summary: A fiery second set with strong Jerry and Vince performances, captured in a solid recording.
review: Reviewers rave about the second set from this 1992 show, calling it one of the best of the year and highlighting Jerry's inspired playing and Vince's great keyboard tone. While no specific technical details are given, the enthusiasm suggests the audio is at least good enough to showcase the band's groove.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it gives a perfect five‑star rating and praises both performance and sound, indicating an excellent show with acceptable recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on the mix, but the reviewer notes Vince sounds great, implying a clear enough capture of the band.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as firing away and grooving, with the band inspiring throughout.

band_member_comments.Keys: Vince's keyboard tone is praised as sounding great.
